texto: Hockey captures the essence of the Canadian experience in the New World. In a land so inescapably and inhospitably cold hockey is the dance of life and an affirmation that despite the deathly chill of winter we are alive.
explicacao: Citação de Bruce Kidd sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Hockey captures the essence of the Canadian experience in the New World. In a land so inescapably…” articula reflexao, sport, hockey em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
